report.summary: Community v5 cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#193-197) covering Hashdex ADA ETF inclusion, Iran ground troops escalation, XRP Ledger AI security, 868-page milestone, and weekly wrap thread. Created Discord/TG late evening update and Newsletter v31 addendum. Designed SVG social card: Hashdex ADA ETF (1200x630 with market stats, fear gauge, institutional context). 868 pages now live per published-pages.ts.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #193: Hashdex Adds Cardano to Nasdaq Crypto Index ETF — ADA joins BTC and XRP in regulated fund, SEC commodity classification context. Links to ETF guide. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 7PM ET.

Tweet #194: Ground Troops & Crypto — US deploys to Middle East, conflict escalation pricing into risk-off. Historical parallel to Oct 2023 ($27K→$73K). Links to fear-greed-timeline + risk-analyzer. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 10AM ET.
Tweet #195: XRP Ledger AI-Native Security — XRPL rolling out AI-powered threat detection at protocol level. Links to XRP guide. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 2PM ET.
Tweet #196: 868 Pages Milestone — Platform overview: 20 tools, 150+ guides, 19 exchange reviews, 19 wallet reviews, 15 ecosystem deep-dives. All free. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 11AM ET.
Tweet #197: Weekly Wrap Thread (5 parts) — BTC $84K→$67.9K, Sacks exit, BlackRock ETHB, Hashdex ADA, Iran escalation, 868 pages shipped. Scheduled: Mon Mar 30, 3PM ET.
Discord/TG: Late Evening Update — BTC $67,900, ETH $2,047, XRP $1.35, F&G 13. Hashdex ADA ETF, Iran ground troops, XRPL AI security, 868 pages live.
Newsletter v31 Addendum — Hashdex ADA ETF inclusion, institutional pipeline building through fear, platform milestone update.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Hashdex ADA ETF (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with ETF UPDATE badge. Headline: 'Cardano Joins Hashdex Nasdaq Crypto Index ETF'. 4 stat cards: ADA IN INDEX (SEC classified), BTC $67,900 (-4%), ETH $2,047 (-4%), F&G 13 (48-day streak). Context panel: regulated ETF, 16 SEC commodity classifications, institutional pipeline. Fear gauge bar at 13%. CTA linking crypto-etfs-complete-guide.
